name: Elaheh Ahmadi
roles: Co-founder & Chief AI Officer, VIVA AI
bio: I'm a serial entrepreneur, engineer, and photographer with a passion for building transformative technologies. As the co-founder and Chief AI Officer at VIVA AI, I'm leading the charge in revolutionizing dental and medical offices with our next-generation AI Receptionist & Office Manager.

I'm also the co-founder of Themis AI, where we're on a mission to empower the world to create, advance, and deploy trustworthy AI solutions. My specialty is in reliable and trustworthy AI applications, AI in healthcare, robotics, and entrepreneurship.

publications.title: Uncertainty-aware Language Modeling for Selective Question Answering
Risk-Aware Image Generation by Estimating and Propagating Uncertainty
Capsa: A Unified Framework for Quantifying Risk in Deep Neural Networks
Systems and methods for deep learning model optimization

talks.title: Themis AI — Breaking down bias in AI applications
Themis AI at Solve at MIT 2023
